items.title: Trustee Act 1925
items.description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to trustees in England and Wales.

items.title: Law of Property Act 1925
items.description: An Act to consolidate the enactments relating to Conveyancing and the Law of Property in England and Wales.

items.title: Land Registration Act 1925 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to consolidate the Land Transfer Acts and the statute law relating to registered land.

items.title: Land Charges Act 1925
items.description: An Act to consolidate the enactments relating to the registration of pending actions, annuities, writs, orders, deeds of arrangement and land charges, and to searches.

items.title: Administration of Estates Act 1925
items.description: An Act to consolidate Enactments relating to the Administration of the Estates of Deceased Persons.

items.title: Universities and College Estates Act 1925
items.description: An Act to consolidate the Universities and College Estates Acts, 1858 to 1898, and enactments amending those Acts.

items.title: Administration of Justice Act 1925
items.description: An Act to amend the law with respect to the jurisdiction and business of the Supreme Court in. England and with respect to the judges, officers and offices thereof and otherwise with respect to the administration of justice.

items.title: Rent and Mortgage Interest (Restrictions Continuance) Act 1925
Church of Scotland (Property And Endowments) Act 1925
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to Teinds and to the Stipends of Ministers of the Church of Scotland, and the tenure of the Property and Endowments of that Church, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Northern Ireland Land Act 1925
items.description: An Act to amend the Law relating to the Occupation and Ownership of Land in Northern Ireland; and for other purposes relating thereto.

items.title: Poor Law Emergency Provisions Continuance (Scotland) Act 1925
Finance Act 1925
items.description: An Act to grant certain Duties of Customs and Inland Revenue (including Excise), to alter other Duties, and to amend the law relating to Customs and Inland Revenue (including Excise) and the National Debt, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Merchant Shipping (Equivalent Provisions) Act 1925 (repealed 1.5.1994)
items.description: An Act to provide for the exemption, in certain circumstances, of Foreign ships and British ships registered outside the United Kingdom from certain provisions of the Merchant Shipping Acts.

items.title: Performing Animals (Regulation) Act 1925
items.description: An Act to regulate the Exhibition and Training of Performing Animals.

items.title: Merchant Shipping (International Labour Conventions) Act 1925 (repealed 1.5.1995)
items.description: An Act to give effect to certain Draft Conventions adopted by the International Labour Conference relating respectively to an unemployment indemnity for seamen in the case of loss or foundering of their ship, the minimum age for the admission of young persons to employment as trimmers and stokers, and the compulsory medical examination of children and young persons employed at sea.

items.title: Statutory Gas Companies (Electricity Supply Powers) Act 1925
Dramatic and Musical Performers' Protection Act 1925
Improvement of Land Act (1899) Amendment Act 1925
Ministers of Religion (Removal of Disqualifications) Act 1925

items.description: An Act to facilitate the acquisition and maintenance of allotments, and to make further provision for the security of tenure of tenants of allotments.

items.title: Widows', Orphans' and Old Age Contributory Pensions Act 1925
Public Health Act 1925
items.description: An Act to amend the Public Health Acts 1875 to 1907, and the Baths and Washhouses Acts 1846 to 1899, in respect of matters for which provision is commonly made in local Acts and for other purposes relating to the public health.

items.title: Honours (Prevention of Abuses) Act 1925
items.description: An Act for the prevention of abuses in connection with the Grant of Honours.

items.title: National Library of Scotland Act 1925 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to establish a National Library in Scotland on the foundation of the Library gifted for that purpose by the Faculty of Advocates, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Circuit Courts and Criminal Procedure (Scotland) Act 1925

Land Settlement (Facilities) Amendment Act 1925 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to amend the Land Settlement (Facilities) Act, 1919, by substituting other provisions for those contained in section twenty-seven of the said Act.

items.title: Criminal Justice Act 1925
items.description: An Act to amend the law with respect to the administration of criminal justice in England, and otherwise to amend the criminal law.

items.title: Tithe Act 1925 (repealed 19.11.1998)
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to Tithe rentcharge and other rentcharges, rents and payments in lieu of Tithe, and the payment of rates thereon; and for other matters connected therewith.

items.title: Coastguard Act 1925
items.description: An Act to amend the law with respect to the Coastguard, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Rating and Valuation Act 1925
items.description: An Act to simplify and amend the law with respect to the making and collection of rates by the consolidation of rates and otherwise, to promote uniformity in the valuation of property for the purpose of rates, to amend the law with respect to the valuation of machinery and certain other classes of properties, and for other purposes incidental to or connected with the matters aforesaid.
